ast.source: Display a lock icon next to locked notes in the file explorer

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, normally locked notes will be read-only. If disabled, you can switch to edit mode.
ast.target: 启用后，通常被锁定的笔记将为只读。禁用后，你可以切换到编辑模式。
